brief.objective: explain CARE Coaching and drive inquiry
keyMessages: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
proofPoints: The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The Pathways products page describes CARE Coaching as collaborative educator support with reflective and data-driven practices.
visualDirection: coach and school leader reviewing notes
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a one-page flyer with a strong headline, short audience framing, three concise support blocks, a source-grounded proof point, and one clear CTA.

headlineOptions: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
Consulting, coaching, and continuous learning for your team
subheadOptions: CARE Coaching provides tailored professional development, workshops, program evaluations, and personalized coaching that help educators reflect on current practice.
CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
copy.body: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders. For district EL leaders, this draft focuses on customized coaching and professional learning for multilingual learner support.
bullets: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.

fittedCopy.headline: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
fittedCopy.deck: Support educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
proofPoints: Support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
Support educator reflection with customized coaching.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: large campaign headline with compact support proof
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: full-bleed branded atmosphere cropped into the composition
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: left-led editorial stack with proof band integrated below

designRecipe.hierarchy: large campaign headline, concise deck, two proof points, and compact lower CTA with official logo controlled by the app
designRecipe.artDirection: CARE Coaching campaign flyer for district EL leaders, using a warm evidence-based coaching atmosphere with diverse educators, multilingual learner support cues, family partnership energy, and standards-aligned planning woven into an editorial split
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: create natural negative space, light falloff, subject crop, and directional flow for app-set type; never draw boxes, cards, fake copy, or logo marks
designRecipe.appComposition: left-led editorial stack with top-left official logo area, right-field full-bleed visual story, and lower proof/CTA rhythm integrated through color and motion
promptDirectives: Design the whole 4:5 flyer concept, not a decorative background.
Keep the left message zone clear through natural negative space while the right-field visual story carries CARE Coaching warmth.
Show district EL leadership themes: coaching conversations, multilingual learner success, family engagement, and collaborative planning.
Use polished teal-blue-green educational brand energy with soft light and human-centered cropping.
Do not render text, logos, badges, contact bars, UI modules, blank cards, or placeholder panels.

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?
warnings: CARE Coaching prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): lecture hall, random books, fake chevron.

imageResults.revisedPrompt: Portrait full-page 1024x1536 campaign art plate for a district-facing CARE Coaching flyer, text-free and logo-free. Create a premium editorial education-sector visual concept, not a template or background. Composition: left-led editorial stack with a naturally clear type-safe message zone on the left created by soft light falloff, shallow depth, warm negative space, subtle teal-blue-green atmospheric gradients, and gentle texture; right side is a full-bleed visual story with layered depth and directional flow toward the left text zone. Theme: customized coaching, professional learning, multilingual learner support, practical district leadership. Show an authentic coaching conversation between diverse educators and a school/district leader in a bright professional learning setting: a coach and leader collaboratively reviewing non-readable notes and language-support planning materials, with other educators softly visible in the background. Emphasize the Three Cs concept only visually through three subtle grouped collaboration moments or three color accents/material clusters, NOT text, icons, letters, marks, chevrons, arrows, or logos. Warm but polished evidence-based atmosphere; educator-centered, collaborative, reflective, practical. Brand palette influence: polished teal, blue-green, soft green, and restrained warm yellow highlights. Use refined editorial photography style or high-end photographic illustration with rich visual density, intentional crop, subject energy kept away from trim edges, no close-up faces, no detailed hands. Keep lower area with compact natural rhythm and enough contrast/texture for app-composed proof points and CTA, but do not draw any boxes, panels, cards, modules, contact bars, UI, charts, badges, seals, or placeholders. Absolutely no readable text, letters, numbers, labels, fake paragraphs, book titles, URLs, phone numbers, citations, logo-like marks, wordmarks, initials, chevrons, arrows, mountain marks, background logo patterns, or document layouts. Avoid generic stock training room, posed workshop photo, random book stacks, fake claims, endorsement imagery. Full designed campaign flyer concept with visual hierarchy, natural negative space, premium atmosphere, layered depth, and type-safe contrast zones; app will add all logo, headline, CTA, proof copy, and source evidence.

sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching headline

sourceEvidence.excerpt: We customize our work to meet your unique needs.
sourceEvidence.label: Customized support

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Professional learning offerings are designed to help educators reflect on their current practices and implement research-based actions.
